name: material-point-fixity
description: Fix or release degrees of freedom on material points with 'mpoint fix' / 'mpoint free'. Applying a velocity component fixes it (use 0 to pin a boundary); pore-pressure fixity drives the hydraulic boundary. 'multiplier' scales the fixed value over time.

notes: 'mpoint fix velocity-x 0 range ...' pins the x-motion of the selected material points.
Fix pore pressure for the hydro-mechanical / fluid-coupled solution.
'multiplier' applies a time-varying factor; 'range' scopes which material points are affected.
